overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character in a long coat and hat walking through a snowy mountain landscape at night. The character traverses a path between rock formations and a wooden fence, eventually reaching an overlook that reveals a distant valley settlement with warm lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail between rock wall and wooden fence

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snowy path with a rock formation on the left and wooden fence on the right

entered.detail: large dark rock outcropping covered in snow on the left side of the path
weathered wooden fence line running along the right side of the snowy path
snow-packed trail winding through the mountain terrain
snow-capped mountain peaks visible in the distance under the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow snowy mountain trail at night, flanked by a large rock formation on the left and a wooden fence on the right. The path stretches ahead toward distant snow-capped mountains under a dark blue night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy mountain trail approaching ridge

events.description: wooden fence on right side ends, opening up to the mountainside

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as the path opens up with snow-covered vegetation on both sides

segments.scene_description: The trail opens up as the wooden fence falls behind, revealing a wider mountain path with sparse vegetation poking through the snow. The rock formation recedes into the distance on the left as the character approaches a ridge overlooking the valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain overlook with view of valley settlement

events.description: path crests revealing a valley settlement with warm lights below

agents.ego_description: walking toward the overlook with the settlement lights becoming visible in the valley below

entered.detail: distant town or camp nestled in the snowy valley with multiple buildings
warm glowing lights from windows and lamps in the distant settlement

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the crest of the hill, revealing a breathtaking view of a valley settlement below. Warm lights glow from the distant buildings against the cold blue night, while the path continues descending toward the town.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a narrow mountain trail that gradually opens into a sweeping overlook of a distant valley settlement. It begins with the character walking between a towering rock formation and a wooden fence under a dark blue night sky. As the character progresses, the fence falls away and the rock formation recedes, allowing the trail to expand into a wider path with sparse vegetation emerging from the snow. The scene then shifts as the character reaches the crest of a hill, revealing a breathtaking vista where warm lights from a town glow against the cold blue landscape. Finally, the camera lingers on the contrast between the snowy ridge and the illuminated settlement below as the path begins its descent toward the valley.
